features.autoEscalateText: This feature automatically increases the rate at which participants, including newly eligible employees, contribute to the Plan by 1% each year, up toa maximum of 10%, on July 1.
features.loansText: General purpose loans are available for terms of 12 to 48 months.
features.autoEnrollText: In general, newly eligible employees who do not take action to enroll in the Plan within a 30-day notification period are automatically enrolled with a pre-tax contribution rate equal to 7% of their eligible base pay.
